name: Chicken with Peppers and Sausage
recipeIngredient: 4 tsp Balsamic or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. About 40 minutes before serving, heat sausage and 1/4 cup water in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat until boiling. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
2. Remove the cover and continue cooking sausages until browned, about 20 minutes, turning them frequently to release fat.
3. Meanwhile, cut each pepper into 1-1/2 inch wide strips. Cut red onion into thin wedges.
4. In a saucepan over medium-high heat, heat olive or salad oil in hot olive or salad oil. Cook peppers, onions, and thyme for about 10 minutes, or until vegetables are fork-tender, stirring frequently.
5. Cut each chicken breast in half and sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
6. Remove sausage to paper towels to drain and cool slightly; thinly slice sausage diagonally.
7. In the remaining sausage drippings in the skillet over medium heat, cook chicken breasts until tender and browned, about 10-15 minutes.
8. Add vinegar, vegetable mixture, and sliced sausage to the skillet; heat through.
9. Garnish with thyme sprigs before serving.
Makes 4 servings.
